name: Go Gin Patterns
description: Gin web framework patterns for predictive code completion

patterns.name: Gin Handler Function
Gin Handler with Service
patterns.description: Handler struct method with dependency injection

patterns.name: Gin JSON Success Response
Gin JSON Data Response
patterns.template: c.JSON(http.StatusOK, $DATA)

patterns.name: Gin JSON Created Response
patterns.template: c.JSON(http.StatusCreated, $DATA)

patterns.name: Gin Bind JSON Request
Gin Bind URI Params
Gin Bind Query Params
Gin Get Path Param
patterns.template: $PARAM := c.Param("$PARAM_NAME")

patterns.name: Gin Get Query Param
patterns.description: Get single query parameter with default
patterns.template: $PARAM := c.DefaultQuery("$PARAM_NAME", "$DEFAULT")

patterns.name: Gin Middleware Function
Gin Auth Middleware
Gin Router Group
Gin Router Group with Middleware
Gin Abort with Error
patterns.template: c.AbortWithStatusJSON(http.Status$STATUS, gin.H{"error": $ERROR})

patterns.name: Gin Abort with Wrapped Error
Gin Get Context Value
patterns.description: Get value from context with type assertion

patterns.name: Gin Set Context Value
patterns.template: c.Set("$KEY", $VALUE)

patterns.name: Gin Handler Struct
Gin CRUD Handler Struct
patterns.description: Complete CRUD handler with all methods

patterns.name: Gin Register Routes
Gin Validation Error Handler
Gin Custom Recovery Middleware
Gin CORS Middleware
Gin Logging Middleware
